name: Amarkantak
description: The meeting point of the Vindhya and Satpura Ranges, this sacred hill town is the source of the holy rivers Narmada and Son.
history: Known as 'Teerthraj' (King of Pilgrimages). The Kalchuri temples here date back to the 10th-11th centuries.
famousFor: Narmada Udgam, Ancient Temples, and waterfalls.
